ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this module. This syncs with DNN module settings and does not display to visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used for #anchor-links on the page. Use letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional. Main heading shown above the product list.

SectionIntro.helper: Optional. Short supporting copy shown below the heading.
SectionIntro.placeholder: These are the tools and resources used alongside this content.

Products.helper: Add one or more products. Products are grouped automatically by Category in the view.

ProductImages.helper: Required. Add one or more product images. Files should live in /Portals/#/Content/Store/Products/.

items.helper: Recommended: clean product images at 1200px wide or larger.

BuyLink.helper: Required. Paste the Amazon product URL. Add your affiliate parameters directly to the link if needed.

ProductDescription.helper: Required. Keep this short and useful. Aim for 1 to 3 short paragraphs or a concise summary.
ProductDescription.placeholder: A supportive tool for guided self-release work and follow-along practice.

Category.helper: Required. Portal-specific category used to group products on the page.

Tags.helper: Optional. Add short tags to help visitors scan the product quickly.
